summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Football Match Analyzer + Prediction Game. Backend APIs working perfectly (19/19 tests passed). Frontend UI fully functional with excellent user experience.

integration_issues.issue: Comment input form not visible on match detail page

passed_tests: Homepage loads with all sections (hero, upcoming matches, recent results, leaderboard)
User registration creates account with 1000 credits
Matches page displays with filters and navigation
Match detail page shows score, tabs (Timeline, Statistics, Predictions, Comments)
Predictions system allows placing bets with winner/exact score/total goals
Leaderboard displays user rankings with XP and win rates
Dashboard shows user stats, XP progress, badges
Navigation between all pages works correctly
Backend API endpoints (19/19 tests passed): auth, matches, bets, comments, leaderboard, dashboard
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Comment input form not visible on match detail pages. Otherwise app is fully functional.
